headline: Bubbles McSqueaky Opens Hair Salon That Only Cuts Invisible Hair, Charges $200
summary: Customers leave feeling 'lighter' and 'slightly scammed' but 'too polite to complain.'
fullBody: Bubbles McSqueaky has opened 'The Emperor's New Salon,' which only cuts invisible hair. 'We remove what you can't see,' McSqueaky explained. 'It's about potential.' Each session costs $200 and involves scissors snipping air while customers wear 'conceptual capes.' Yelp reviews are mixed: 'I felt something, maybe,' one wrote. McSqueaky is now offering 'imaginary coloring' for an extra $150.
